description: First Notice of Loss. Orchestrator-emitted claim binding — the root record every downstream step references by claimNumber. lossType is the PRIMARY loss mechanism; set injuryInvolved=true when an occupant-injury exposure accompanies it (e.g. collision + injury) so it is routed to PIP/injury handling rather than collapsing the two into one enum value.

injuryInvolved.description: true if the loss carries an occupant-injury component alongside the primary lossType; signals a separate injury/PIP exposure.
